text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Osaka Hai, and Gold City appears
unable to put her mind to the race. She's unsure
whether she should run in her feckless state.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's running without a goal, but she won't allow
this to make her look like a loser. Despite her
lack of enthusiasm, she heads off to start the
race.
